templates.name: immutable revision and exact approval binding
invariants: one approval authorizes one exact immutable revision

templates.name: budget reservation and conservation
questions: Which transitions commit, release, or refund?

templates.name: shared distributed rate authority
questions: What shared key owns the bucket?
Can another worker or restart bypass it?
invariants: distributed rate authority cannot be bypassed per process

templates.name: receipt and proof continuity
questions: Do output, receipt, proof, and accounting name the same effect?

templates.name: crash repair and reconciliation
questions: What is the last durable step?
What convergent repair resumes without redispatch?
invariants: repair never erases accepted effects or invents completion

use_rule: questions and invariants only; never task-specific conclusions
